reference: I had all four wisdom teeth removed. I know the bottom ones were impacted, but now, four days later, there is a bit of discharge from one of the extraction sites, and I have a lump about the size of a quarter in diameter. I am worried about infection and was never given any antibiotics. The stitches still haven't come out yet, so I don't expect healing to be quite complete. How do I know if there is an infection? Should I expect a few more days to heal?
